attributes.title: [CockroachDB OTel] Storage Engine
attributes.description: Pebble storage engine health: L0 files, write stalls, write amplification, disk capacity, and compaction metrics.

Pebble (LSM-tree) storage health:
- L0 file/sublevel counts (high = write stall risk)
- Write stalls (critical — blocks all writes)
- Capacity utilisation and disk I/O
- Write amplification and compaction backlog
